description.en: Commonly known as the 「Baby Fish」 because its distress call sounds like a crying infant.
description.zh: 俗称「娃娃鱼」，因为它的叫声听起来很像婴儿的哭声。

anatomy.en: It is the world's largest amphibian, growing up to 1.8 meters long. It has flat heads, tiny eyes, and wrinkled skin.
anatomy.zh: 它是世界上最大的两栖动物，身长可达 1.8 米。它有扁平的头、微小的眼睛和皱巴巴的皮肤。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are nocturnal hunters that wait for crabs and fish in cold mountain streams. They can live for over 60 years!
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是夜间猎手，在寒冷的山涧中等待螃蟹和鱼类。它们可以活 60 多年！

habitat_and_distribution.en: Found in mountain streams and lakes in central, south, and southwest China.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 分布在中国中部、南部和西南部的山涧河流与湖泊中。
